mapper.sql: ID AS id , UPPER_PARTNER_ID AS upperPartnerId , FILE_ID AS fileId , LOGIS_ID AS logisId , PARTNER_NM AS partnerNm , SHORT_NM AS shortNm , PARTNER_TEL_NO AS partnerTelNo , REP_NM AS repNm , REP_TEL_NO AS repTelNo , COMP_NO AS compNo , DETAIL_INFO AS detailInfo , PARTNER_EMAIL AS partnerEmail , CRE_USER AS creUser , CRE_TM AS creTm , UPD_USER AS updUser , UPD_TM AS updTm , DEL_YN AS deleteYn , ADD_TIME AS addTime , ETC_ACC_CNTN AS etcAccCntn , MISONG_YN AS misongYn , SIZE_INFO AS sizeInfo , ORDER_SHORT_NM AS orderShortNm , ORDER_SEQ AS orderSeq
mapper.select:
/* com.shop.mapper.partner.selectPartnerListPaging */ SELECT COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalRowCount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY TP.ID ASC) AS no, TP.ID AS id, TP.PARTNER_TICKER , TP.PARTNER_NM, TP.PARTNER_SUB_NM, TP.DOMAIN , TP.PHONE_NO, TP.CRE_TM AS creTm, TP.CRE_USER AS creUser, FN_GET_USERNAME(TP.CRE_USER) as creuserNm, TP.UPD_TM AS updTm, TP.UPD_USER AS updUser, FN_GET_USERNAME(TP.UPD_USER) as upduserNm FROM TB_PARTNER AS TP WHERE TP.DEL_YN = 'N'
AND TP.PARTNER_NM LIKE '%' || #{filter.partnerNm} || '%'
AND TP.CRE_TM BETWEEN #{filter.startDate} AND #{filter.endDate} + INTERVAL '1 day'
ORDER BY TP.ID DESC OFFSET ((#{curPage}-1) * #{pageRowCount}) ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageRowCount} ROWS ONLY

/* com.shop.mapper.partner.selectMyPartnerByLoginId */ SELECT A.ID AS id, A.UPPER_PARTNER_ID AS upperPartnerId, B.PARTNER_NM AS upperPartnerNm, A.FILE_ID AS fileId, A.LOGIS_ID AS logisId, A.PARTNER_NM AS partnerNm, A.SHORT_NM AS shortNm, A.PARTNER_TEL_NO AS partnerTelNo, A.REP_NM AS repNm, A.REP_TEL_NO AS repTelNo, A.COMP_NO AS compNo, A.DETAIL_INFO AS detailInfo, A.PARTNER_EMAIL AS partnerEmail, A.CRE_TM AS creTm, A.UPD_TM AS updTm, A.DEL_YN AS deleteYn, A.ADD_TIME AS addTime, A.ETC_ACC_CNTN AS etcAccCntn, A.MISONG_YN AS misongYn, A.SIZE_INFO AS sizeInfo, A.ORDER_SHORT_NM AS orderShortNm, A.FACSETTLE_ETC_CNTN AS facsettleEtcCntn, A.SEL_GB1_CNTN AS selGb1Cntn, A.SEL_GB2_CNTN AS selGb2Cntn, A.FAC_GB1_CNTN AS facGb1Cntn, A.FAC_GB2_CNTN AS facGb2Cntn, COALESCE((SELECT X.USER_NM FROM TB_USER X WHERE A.CRE_USER = X.LOGIN_ID), A.CRE_USER) AS creUser, COALESCE((SELECT X.USER_NM FROM TB_USER X WHERE A.UPD_USER = X.LOGIN_ID), A.UPD_USER) AS updUser FROM TB_PARTNER A LEFT JOIN TB_PARTNER B ON A.UPPER_PARTNER_ID = B.ID JOIN TB_USER U ON A.ID = U.PARTNER_ID WHERE U.LOGIN_ID = #{loginId} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' LIMIT 1

/* com.shop.mapper.partner.selectPartnerById */ SELECT A.ID AS id , A.UPPER_PARTNER_ID AS upperPartnerId , A.FILE_ID AS fileId , A.LOGIS_ID AS logisId , A.PARTNER_NM AS partnerNm , A.PARTNER_ENG_NM AS partnerEngNm , A.SHORT_NM AS shortNm , A.PARTNER_TEL_NO AS partnerTelNo , A.REP_NM AS repNm , A.REP_TEL_NO AS repTelNo , A.COMP_NO AS compNo , A.PARTNER_EMAIL AS partnerEmail , A.ADD_TIME AS addTime , A.DETAIL_INFO AS detailInfo , FN_GET_USERNAME(A.CRE_USER) AS creUser , A.CRE_TM AS creTm , FN_GET_USERNAME(A.UPD_USER) AS updUser , A.UPD_TM AS updTm , A.DEL_YN AS deleteYn , A.ETC_ACC_CNTN AS etcAccCntn , A.MISONG_YN AS misongYn , A.SIZE_INFO AS sizeInfo , A.ORDER_SHORT_NM AS orderShortNm , A.COMP_INFO AS compInfo , A.GUBUN_INFO AS gubunInfo , A.SETTL_CD AS settlCd , A.COMP_PRN_CD AS compPrnCd , A.SAMPLE_PRN_YN AS samplePrnYn , A.PARTNER_ADDR AS partnerAddr , A.PARTNER_ADDR_ETC AS partnerAddrEtc , A.SNS_TYPE AS snsType , A.SNS_ID AS snsId , A.ETC_CNTN AS etcCntn , A.SEL_GB1_CNTN AS selGb1Cntn , A.SEL_GB2_CNTN AS selGb2Cntn , A.FAC_GB1_CNTN AS facGb1Cntn , A.FAC_GB2_CNTN AS facGb2Cntn , A.DESIGN_CNTN AS designCntn , A.ORDER_SEQ FROM TB_PARTNER A WHERE A.ID = #{id}
SELECT ID FROM TB_PARTNER WHERE PARTNER_NM = #{partnerNm} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
